title: schinus molle var. areira
intro: Schinus molle var. areira, also known as Peruvian pepper or Molle pepper, is a variety of the Schinus molle tree, native to South America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a valuable remedy for skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Schinus molle var. areira include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Schinus molle var. areira can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make ointments and salves for topical application.
